academy_info.title_part1: Comprehensive Basics and Advanced courses that guide you to

leaderboard.description: Celebrate progress and achievement. Discover top-performing learners and get inspired to keep improving.

about_us.p1: Ammar SAT Academy is a results-driven learning system designed specifically for American Diploma students aiming to achieve high scores in SAT, ACT, and EST exams. Founded by Ammar Adel, the Academy was built on a clear mission: to transform the way students prepare—moving beyond traditional teaching into a structured system that delivers measurable improvement.
about_us.p2: At Ammar Academy, preparation is not random practice; it is strategic. Students are trained to understand the logic behind every question, recognize common traps, and apply time-management techniques that maximize performance under real test conditions. Each course combines live interactive sessions with carefully designed recorded lessons, ensuring both engagement and mastery.
about_us.p3: What sets Ammar Academy apart is its strong follow-up and accountability system. Students receive weekly assignments, regular mock tests, and continuous performance tracking. Parents are kept informed through detailed progress reports, creating a supportive environment that drives consistency and discipline.
about_us.p4: The Academy has helped thousands of students significantly improve their scores, with many achieving outstanding results in SAT English and Math. These successes are not exceptions—they are the outcome of a proven system that focuses on clarity, practice, and feedback.
about_us.p5: With a growing community of ambitious students and a commitment to excellence, Ammar SAT Academy continues to set a new standard for test preparation in Egypt and across the Arab world.
about_us.p6: Smart preparation leads to smart results.

privacy_policy.subtitle: Student Policy and Registration Terms - Ammar Academy
privacy_policy.intro: By registering in one of the SAT, ACT, or EST preparation programs offered by Ammar Academy, the student and their guardian acknowledge and agree to all the following policies and terms:
privacy_policy.s1_p1: Students must attend all live sessions and follow recorded videos weekly.
privacy_policy.s1_p2: Participation in weekly tests and homework submission is an essential part of the evaluation.
privacy_policy.s1_p3: In case of absence, a written excuse must be sent within 48 hours.
privacy_policy.s1_p5: Repeated unexcused absences lead to cancellation of the free re-enrollment privilege or exclusion from study groups.
privacy_policy.s2_p1: Students are entitled to re-enroll in the course more than once with an administrative fee of 700 EGP per subject for each re-enrollment, subject to the Academy's available schedule, provided that:
privacy_policy.s2_p1_b1: Attendance of at least 70% of live sessions
privacy_policy.s2_p1_b2: Completion of at least 50% of assignments and tests
privacy_policy.s2_p1_b3: A verified written excuse in case of prolonged absence
privacy_policy.s2_p1_b4: Re-enrollment request submitted within 7 days of course end or at least one month before the new course starts
privacy_policy.s2_p2: An administrative fee of only 700 EGP is collected upon re-enrollment.
privacy_policy.s3_intro: In case of withdrawal from the course after registration, fees are refunded according to the following policy:
privacy_policy.s3_b1: If registration is cancelled before the course starts: 90% of the paid fees are refunded.
privacy_policy.s3_b2: If withdrawal occurs during the first week: 70% of the fees are refunded.
privacy_policy.s3_b3: If withdrawal occurs during the second week: 50% of the fees are refunded.
privacy_policy.s3_b4: If withdrawal occurs after the second week: no refund is applicable.
privacy_policy.s3_b5: If the course is cancelled by the Academy: 100% of the amount is refunded.
privacy_policy.s3_p1: Refund requests must be submitted in writing via email or official WhatsApp, and the refund process takes 10 to 15 business days.
privacy_policy.s4_p1: All students are expected to maintain proper conduct, mutual respect, and refrain from cheating or copying assignments.
privacy_policy.s4_p2: Sharing educational materials with others outside the course is prohibited.
privacy_policy.s4_p3: Any violation may result in immediate dismissal without fee refund.
privacy_policy.s5_p1: Communication with students is conducted through:
privacy_policy.s5_p2: Monthly performance reports are sent to parents when needed.
privacy_policy.s6_p1: By confirming registration, the student and their guardian are considered to have agreed to all the above terms and policies. This policy aims to ensure a fair and organized educational environment that helps students achieve the best possible performance.
